services.sectionSubtitle: Complete drywall solutions built for structural integrity

items.title: Drywall Repair
items.description: Holes, cracks, water damage — no matter the issue, we restore your walls to a factory-smooth finish. Our repair contractors assess the root cause and deliver lasting solutions, not band-aid fixes.

items.title: Level 5 Remodeling
items.description: Transforming your space starts with the walls. We handle full-room remodels with precision framing, expert taping, and Level 5 finishing — the highest standard in the industry.

items.title: New Installation
items.description: From new construction to additions, we install 1/2" and 5/8" drywall boards with fire-rated and moisture-resistant options. Every seam is taped, mudded, and sanded to perfection.
items.stat: 5/8" boards reduce noise by up to 50%

items.title: Seamless Patching
items.description: Large patches from plumbing access — we match existing textures like orange peel, knockdown, or smooth so the repair is invisible. We use setting-type compounds for superior bonding.

why.sectionSubtitle: Drywall is the foundation of an energy-efficient, safe home

points.title: Fire Resistance (Type X)
points.description: Type X drywall provides up to 1 hour of fire resistance. A single 5/8" layer can be the difference between containment and catastrophe. Building codes require it for good reason.

points.title: Acoustic Sound Insulation
points.description: Double-layer drywall with Green Glue compound achieves an STC rating of 50+, meaning normal speech is inaudible through the wall. That's the difference between hearing everything and hearing nothing.

points.title: Moisture Control Systems
points.description: Moisture-resistant (green board) and mold-resistant (purple board) drywall prevent the #1 cause of wall failure in Oregon's wet climate. Standard drywall absorbs water, ours doesn't.

points.title: Thermal Efficiency
points.description: Properly sealed drywall reduces thermal bridging and air leakage. Combined with insulation, it can lower your heating and cooling costs by up to 20%.

about.subtitle: We build walls that are beautiful, functional, and rigorously engineered.
about.description: Since day one, Enzou Drywall has been about one thing: doing the job right. We're not the cheapest option — we're the best one. Every project gets the same commercial-grade treatment: precise assessment, top-tier materials (USG Sheetrock and ProForm), expert installation, and a finish so flawless you'll question if it's even drywall.
about.description2: As a locally owned operation in Oregon City, we know the climate challenges — moisture, temperature swings, settling foundations. We build for Oregon conditions, not textbook ones. Our CCB license (#236274) means we're bonded, insured, and accountable for every square foot.

discounts.title: We Support Those Who Serve
discounts.description: Special pricing for those who give back to our community. Ask about discounts when you call.

testimonials.sectionSubtitle: Don't take our word for it — hear from homeowners like you

items.name: Sherry K.
items.text: They repaired a huge water-damaged section in our bathroom ceiling. You literally cannot tell where the patch is. The texture matching was perfect — I've shown it to friends and nobody can find the seam.

items.name: Rohit C.
items.text: Full bedroom remodel — they hung new drywall, taped, mudded, and delivered a Level 4 finish in three days. The walls are smoother than our builder-grade original. Worth every dollar.

items.name: Ken R.
items.text: Professional from the estimate to the final walkthrough. They used moisture-resistant boards in our laundry room without me even asking. That attention to detail is why I'll use them again.

items.name: Meng L.
items.text: Our 1970s house had orange peel texture and they matched it perfectly on a 4x4 patch. I was told by two other companies it couldn't be done. Enzou made it look easy.

items.name: Lindsay D.
items.text: We had them install drywall in our new garage conversion. Fire-rated 5/8 inch, properly mudded corners — it passed inspection first try. The inspector even commented on how clean the work was.

items.name: Steve P.
items.text: Six nail pops and two doorknob holes — all fixed in one afternoon. The compound they used dried harder than the original wall. Fast, clean, and the price was exactly what they quoted.

items.name: Jesus M.
items.text: Best drywall company in Oregon City. They don't cut corners — literally. Every inside and outside corner was finished with metal bead. That's how you know someone takes pride in their work.

items.name: Janine R.
items.text: Bathroom remodel with green board for moisture protection. They explained why regular drywall fails in wet areas and recommended the right materials. Educated and skilled — rare combination.

items.name: Garrett W.
items.text: They soundproofed our home office — double-layer 5/8 with resilient channel. I can't hear my kids playing in the next room anymore. Life-changing for someone who works from home.

items.name: Tamara B.
items.text: Our living room had cracks along the ceiling joints from foundation settling. They V-grooved the cracks, used fiberglass mesh tape, and applied three coats. Two years later, zero cracks.

items.name: Michelle B.
items.text: Popcorn ceiling removal on the entire second floor. Clean, fast, and they skim-coated to a smooth finish. The rooms look 20 years newer. Highly recommend for any ceiling work.

contact.sectionSubtitle: Every project starts with a conversation. Tell us what you need — estimates are always free.
